features: COLGATE TOOTHPASTE TRIPLE ACTION ORIGINAL MINT(D)
description: Product Description COLGATE TOOTHPASTE TRIPLE ACTION ORIGINAL MINT(D) Ingredients Aqua, Glycerin, Hydrated Silica, PEG-12, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Cellulose Gum, Aroma, Sodium Fluoride, Sodium Saccharin, Limonene, CI 77891, CI 74260, CI 74160, Contains: Sodium Fluoride (1450 ppmF¯) Directions Take a pea-sized amount on the toothbrush, brush your teeth in circular motions for 2 minutes, pay attention to all surfaces and then rinse. Safety Warning For external use. Do not swallow. Keep out of reach of children. If irritated, stop using and consult a dentist. See more
